items.summary: Reviewer pre-validation failures now block the board immediately instead of being downgraded into synthetic review findings that leak into learning and repair flows.

The shared review-engine parser now fail-closes on invalid reviewer verdicts, conceptual-group severities, fix-decision entries, and leader statuses instead of trusting raw contract fields at runtime.

Per-round review artifacts are now written only after the board finalizes the effective leader verdict, rationale overrides, and deferred-item set, so persisted machine evidence matches the runtime decision.
